description_long: This hotel complex consists of multiple small, individual bungalow-style units arranged symmetrically on a rectangular green plot. The units feature pitched roofs and are organized in rows along the perimeter, with a central cluster of larger buildings and a rectangular pool or water feature near the main entrance. The roofs are a muted brown, and the walls appear to be a lighter beige or tan, suggesting a natural, rustic aesthetic. The layout is open, with clear pathways between the units and communal spaces, evoking a resort or lodge atmosphere. The grounds are landscaped with grass, and the overall design emphasizes privacy and tranquility for each guest unit. No visible signage or decorative elements are present on the exterior.
description: A bungalow-style hotel complex with multiple pitched-roof units arranged around a central green area and water feature, evoking a rustic resort feel.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the hotel from the main entrance side, highlighting the central water feature and the symmetrical arrangement of bungalow units along the sides.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a side perspective, revealing the depth of the complex and the repeating pattern of the bungalow units, as well as the central communal buildings.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the hotel, focusing on the larger central buildings and the back row of bungalows, with the water feature visible behind the main structure.
description_view_3: View 3 offers an angled side view, emphasizing the layout of the bungalows, the green landscaping, and the placement of water features throughout the property.
attribute_entrance_canopy: pitched roof canopy over main entrance, matching building roof material
